payload.objective: Audit service-component provenance for the promoted score32 exp-LUT Llama7B attention row.

decoder_contract.attention_score32_exp_lut_service_closur: Audit the score32 exp-LUT measured-command-control row against the measured wrapper promotion and inherited endpoint/router/SRAM service evidence. Record which service components are measured, which are measured estimates, and which remain inherited HBM/DRAM abstractions before using this row as the Llama7B frontier baseline.

evaluation_record.title: Score32 exp-LUT service closure audit
evaluation_record.primary_question: Which service components are measured, measured-estimated, or still inherited for the promoted score32 exp-LUT Llama7B attention row?
evaluation_record.expected_reason: The result should state whether score32 exp-LUT is supported by measured wrapper evidence and list remaining inherited service abstractions before the next frontier job.
